_comment: Sanitized EXACT offline copy of three real warroom-os terminal board events (8488/8517/8523), read read-only from the live Kanban DB and committed as an offline fixture. Event ids, seqs, task ids, kinds and run-metadata shape are exact; absolute paths and chat snowflakes are sanitized. Never read production at test time.

task_runs.summary: Verdict: BLOCK — startup outage tests pass, but implementation violates explicit “reject generic catch/retry masking”: bootstrap catches Exception per symbol and lazy resync catches Exception, swallowing unexpected RuntimeError as needs_snapshot. Narrow exception taxonomy and add negative test.

Verdict: BLOCK — reviewed candidate 56a25692f5ba100e8f4765286fd803340a136c88 for t_0e72730a. The candidate is not a descendant of required base 9db9ad0, startup TransportError is no longer recovered, and the first-process >=4h long-runtime test file was deleted/missing; targeted exception-taxonomy tests pass but acceptance criteria fail closed.
